zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fenton於1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾芬頓 巴恩斯時，她的父親William Fenton31歲，母親Cecilia Bisset21歲。她於大約1283年與Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1336年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fenton于1270年出生在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾芬頓 巴恩斯时，她的父亲William Fenton31岁，母亲Cecilia Bisset21岁。她于大约1283年与Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1336年在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Northumberland, Staffordshire, and Nottinghamshire, so called from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

Irish: English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Fionnachta or Ó Fiachna ‘descendant of Fiachna’, an old personal name Anglicized as Feighney and sometimes mistranslated as Hunt (see Fee 1 and Finnerty ).
Scottish: habitational name from Fenton in East Lothian.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

variants.name: Fantom
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English fantom, fainton ‘apparition, ghost’. There has been some confusion with Fenton .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fenton was born in 1270, in Fenton Barns, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Fenton, was 31 and her mother, Cecilia Bisset, was 21. She married Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin about 1283, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1336, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fenton est née en 1270, à Fenton Barns, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Fenton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Bisset, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin environ 1283, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1336, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Fenton 1270 in Fenton Barns, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Fenton 31 und ihre Mutter Cecilia Bisset 21. Sie hat um 1283 in Scotland Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1336 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fentonが1270年にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアフエントン バーンスで生まれた時，父William Fentonは31歳，母Cecilia Bissetは21歳であった。約1283年にスコットランドでHenry Sinclair Baron of Roslinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1336年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fenton(이)가 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 펜턴 바른스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fenton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Bisset(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1283년 스컷랜드에서 Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fenton родилась в 1270 г. в местности фентон барнс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Fenton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Bisset, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sinclair Baron of Roslin около 1283 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1336 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет.
